_comment: Phase 2: mutate the @ternity/shared files that have direct tests in src/*.test.ts — others would score ~0 and tell us nothing. Test discipline learned the hard way: NEVER put parse() (or anything that can throw on a mutated schema) in describe-scope — Vitest treats a thrown describe-level setup as a 'file failed' but Stryker's vitest-runner only sees the surviving 'tests passed' count and marks the mutant as survived. Always parse inside it(). TZ=UTC is set by the test:mutation script.
